description: bot_01 is a bot account entity defined by its directed repost relationship to group_a_01, with an observed edge weight of 0.60 in the minimal graph seed—indicating a moderate-strength, non-random content amplification role without further attributed coordination or behavioral metadata.
semantic_prompt: Identify bot_01 as a BotAccount that reposts from group_a_01 with weight 0.60 in the minimal graph seed; distinguish it from coordinated or profile-enriched bots by its null bot_type and absence of OASIS runtime fields.

description: CAMEL-AI is a research-oriented organization focused on advancing multi-agent LLM systems, best known for initiating the OASIS project—a framework for richer, context-aware Twitter profile integration into agent reasoning and runtime environments.
semantic_prompt: CAMEL-AI is an AI research organization that develops open frameworks for multi-agent LLM systems; it launched the OASIS project to enable richer Twitter profile modeling in agent prompts and runtime contexts.

description: group_a_01 is a CitizenUser entity in a minimal social graph seed, characterized by following KOL kol_01 (follow weight 0.80) and serving as a content source for bot_01 (repost weight 0.60); its stance_score of 0.20 indicates low ideological alignment or neutrality.
semantic_prompt: Identify group_a_01 as a low-stance CitizenUser who follows kol_01 and is reposted by bot_01—key for validating richer Twitter profile integration into OASIS runtime fields.

description: News is a generic MediaOutlet entity representing news and blog data sources within the Text data category, serving as foundational real-world input for systems like OASIS—particularly in validating enriched Twitter profile integrations.
semantic_prompt: This entity represents a media outlet category for news and blog content, used as real-world text data input; it anchors validation of richer Twitter profiles in OASIS runtime and prompt engineering.

description: 666ghj is the author and creator of MiroFish, a tool or artifact linked to Twitter profile enrichment and OASIS simulation requirements; identity is primarily defined by technical authorship rather than biographical or organizational attributes.
semantic_prompt: Who is the author of MiroFish, and what is their role in the context of Twitter profile enrichment and OASIS simulation requirements?

description: Blogs is a MediaOutlet entity representing decentralized, informal online publishing platforms that serve as a primary source of unstructured text data from real-world contexts; it is semantically distinct from institutional news outlets by its non-professional authorship, open editorial control, and heterogeneous topical scope.
semantic_prompt: Identify blogs as informal, user-driven digital publishing channels contributing unstructured text data to real-world datasets—distinguish them from professional news outlets by authorship model, editorial governance, and content variability.
